entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation SubQuery Filter Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String>BusinessRoleAccountingHtask , CN=Aaron Nichols,OU=XPeople,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ADX ad_business_role , cn=Aaron.Nichols,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com , LDAPApplication ad_business_role , CN=Aaron Nichols,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ActiveDirectory ad_business_role , CN=Aaron Nichols,OU=XPeople,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ADX </String>
